title: Whimscape x Sophisticated Storage
description: A compatibility resource pack for Whimscape by kavast and Sophisticated Storage by P3pp3rF1y
body:
This is a simple compatibility resource pack for Sophisticated Storage and Whimscape, made because I wanted to play [BCG](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bcg) with Sophisticated Storage instead of some of the other storage mods and got sad that the textures didn't match.

What this changes:
- Chest and barrel textures for each vanilla wood type, plus the tintable versions (what EveryCompat uses to create textures for modded wood types, and the base for the custom textures available with the decoration table)
- Tier upgrade visuals (the upgrade material corners on the chests, barrels, and shulkers themselves)
- Storage link, controller, and I/O blocks

What this does NOT change (yet):
- The decoration table
- The upgrade ITEMS
- Anything to do with Sophisticated Backpacks (for those, please use [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-x-sophisticated) by azuleon)
